analysis.summary: Социалните отношения са основа за устойчива общочовешка цивилизация. Нашата цел е да създадем обществото, където хората са свободни да комуникират и да разгърнат своя потенциал без страх от насилие и унижение. Системата гарантира достъп до базови нужди и ясни правила за всички хора.
key_developments: Four crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded in the Gulf

news_items.title: Four crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
news_items.snippet: The US Central Command says rescue efforts continue after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

news_items.title: 'There's no hiding place on a ship': The sailors stranded in the Gulf
news_items.snippet: Drones, cruise missiles and fighter jets have become a common sight for many sailors stranded on ships in the Gulf.

news_items.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
news_items.snippet: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

github_repos.title: obsei/obsei
github_repos.snippet: Obsei is a low code AI powered automation tool. It can be used in various business flows like social listening, AI based alerting, brand image analysis, comparative study and more .

arxiv_papers.title: The propensity for disobedience: Rule-breaking, compliance and social phase transitions
arxiv_papers.snippet: We develop a mathematical model to describe the persistence of rule-breaking behaviors in societies, such as traffic violations, disregard for legal restrictions and other forms of noncompliance. arxiv_papers.title: Social Knowledge for Cross-Domain User Preference Modeling
arxiv_papers.snippet: We demonstrate that user preferences can be represented and predicted across topical domains using large-scale social modeling.
